room.caption: [NightmareD1] Quite possibly the best remix of the worst soundtrack ever.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(104) global.mapTeleport=4
abilSetRemove(1) global.hasShoes[0]=2 global.hasShoes[1]=2 global.hasShoes[2]=2 global.hasAbilToken[3]=5 global.activeAbility[0]=2 charSwitcher(0)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvExGates)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(904) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

var instrProg; instrProg=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,4) if instrProg!="7" and instrProg!="9" {instance_destroy()}
